name: Internal Medicine
short_description: Adult medicine centered on diagnosis, complex disease management, and longitudinal hospital-clinic care.
full_description: Internal Medicine suits clinicians who enjoy synthesizing symptoms, labs, imaging, physiology, and social context to manage complex adult illness. In Ghana, internists are important in teaching hospitals, regional referral centers, chronic disease clinics, and subspecialty services such as cardiology, nephrology, endocrinology, pulmonology, infectious disease, and gastroenterology.

data.name: Internal Medicine
data.shortDescription: Adult medicine centered on diagnosis, complex disease management, and longitudinal hospital-clinic care.
data.fullDescription: Internal Medicine suits clinicians who enjoy synthesizing symptoms, labs, imaging, physiology, and social context to manage complex adult illness. In Ghana, internists are important in teaching hospitals, regional referral centers, chronic disease clinics, and subspecialty services such as cardiology, nephrology, endocrinology, pulmonology, infectious disease, and gastroenterology.

averageSalaryGHS.disclaimer: Broad directional monthly estimates in Ghana cedis only. Real income varies by seniority, public/private mix, location, call burden, institutional policy, and private practice volume.

trainingPathway.summary: Housemanship, medical officer experience where required, GCPS/WACS-style membership training, then fellowship or subspecialty exposure.
prerequisites: Full registration with the Medical and Dental Council, Ghana
House officer rotations
Primary/membership entry requirements and interview

data.residencyPathwayGhana: Usually pursued through Ghana College of Physicians and Surgeons membership and fellowship pathways at accredited teaching hospitals and regional centers.
data.personalityFitDescription: Best for analytical, patient-facing learners who like complex adult medicine and can tolerate busy ward systems.
data.idealCandidateDescription: A reflective clinician who enjoys diagnosis, continuity, teaching rounds, chronic disease management, and multidisciplinary care.
majorPros: High national relevance for chronic disease
majorCons: Heavy ward workload
Administrative burden
Long training if subspecializing

dayInLifeTimeline.activity: Review overnight admissions, labs, and unstable patients
Consultant-led ward round with residents and students
Coordinate referrals, discharge plans, and investigations
Outpatient clinic for diabetes, hypertension, HIV, or complex referrals
Review new consults and hand over sick patients

commonMisconceptions: It is less decisive than surgery
recommendedStudentActivities: Read ECG and lab interpretation cases

name: General Surgery
short_description: A demanding operative specialty for decisive clinicians who enjoy procedures, urgency, and visible outcomes.
full_description: General Surgery combines acute assessment, operative skill, trauma care, ward leadership, and follow-up. In Ghana it remains essential in teaching hospitals, regional hospitals, district referral systems, and private surgical practice, with a broad case mix including abdominal emergencies, hernias, trauma, breast disease, and soft-tissue conditions.

data.name: General Surgery
data.shortDescription: A demanding operative specialty for decisive clinicians who enjoy procedures, urgency, and visible outcomes.
data.fullDescription: General Surgery combines acute assessment, operative skill, trauma care, ward leadership, and follow-up. In Ghana it remains essential in teaching hospitals, regional hospitals, district referral systems, and private surgical practice, with a broad case mix including abdominal emergencies, hernias, trauma, breast disease, and soft-tissue conditions.

averageSalaryGHS.disclaimer: Broad directional monthly estimates in Ghana cedis only. Real income varies by seniority, public/private mix, location, call burden, institutional policy, and private practice volume.

trainingPathway.summary: Housemanship, surgical rotations, membership training, operative logbook, exams, then fellowship or subspecialty training.
prerequisites: Full MDC registration
Housemanship
GCPS/WACS surgical entry requirements
Fitness for operative and on-call training

data.residencyPathwayGhana: Often through GCPS Surgery & Subspecialties membership/fellowship training at accredited centers, with progressive theatre responsibility and emergency call.
data.personalityFitDescription: Best for high-stamina learners who like procedures, quick decisions, anatomy, and leading teams under pressure.
data.idealCandidateDescription: A practical, resilient, hands-on clinician who can communicate clearly while managing urgent operative risk.
majorCons: Long hours
High emergency burden
Training can be physically and emotionally demanding

dayInLifeTimeline.activity: Pre-round on post-op and emergency admissions
Team ward round and theatre planning
Elective or emergency theatre list
Surgical clinic, wound care, consent discussions
On-call review of trauma and acute abdomen consults

commonMisconceptions: Surgeons do not need communication skills
Every case has an immediate fix

name: Pediatrics
short_description: Child-focused care blending family communication, prevention, broad medicine, and emotional resilience.
full_description: Pediatrics focuses on newborns, children, adolescents, caregivers, growth, development, and acute childhood illness. Ghanaian pediatric practice spans immunization, malaria, neonatal care, nutrition, sickle cell disease, respiratory infections, emergencies, and child development, often in resource-constrained but high-impact settings.

data.name: Pediatrics
data.shortDescription: Child-focused care blending family communication, prevention, broad medicine, and emotional resilience.
data.fullDescription: Pediatrics focuses on newborns, children, adolescents, caregivers, growth, development, and acute childhood illness. Ghanaian pediatric practice spans immunization, malaria, neonatal care, nutrition, sickle cell disease, respiratory infections, emergencies, and child development, often in resource-constrained but high-impact settings.

averageSalaryGHS.disclaimer: Broad directional monthly estimates in Ghana cedis only. Real income varies by seniority, public/private mix, location, call burden, institutional policy, and private practice volume.

trainingPathway.summary: Core child health residency with neonatal, emergency, ward, outpatient, and community child health exposure.
prerequisites: MDC registration
Housemanship
Membership admission requirements
Interest in child and caregiver communication

data.residencyPathwayGhana: Typically through GCPS child health routes at teaching hospitals with ward, neonatal, outpatient, and emergency exposure.
data.personalityFitDescription: Best for empathetic communicators who enjoy children, prevention, family education, and broad diagnostic thinking.
data.idealCandidateDescription: A patient, emotionally steady learner who can explain complex issues to caregivers and handle vulnerable children with care.
majorCons: Emotionally heavy cases
Night calls can be demanding
Caregiver communication can be complex

dayInLifeTimeline.activity: Review overnight admissions and neonatal updates
Pediatric ward round with growth charts and medication review
Counsel caregivers and arrange investigations
Clinic for asthma, sickle cell, nutrition, or development
Emergency consults and handover

commonMisconceptions: It is easy because children are small
Pediatricians only talk to children, not families

name: Obstetrics & Gynecology
short_description: A high-stakes blend of surgery, reproductive health, continuity care, and emergency decision-making.
full_description: Obstetrics & Gynecology combines antenatal care, labor ward emergencies, gynecologic surgery, reproductive health, fertility, oncology, and public health priorities. In Ghana it is central to maternal health, safe delivery, emergency obstetric care, and women's health across teaching hospitals, regional hospitals, district facilities, and private practice.

data.name: Obstetrics & Gynecology
data.shortDescription: A high-stakes blend of surgery, reproductive health, continuity care, and emergency decision-making.
data.fullDescription: Obstetrics & Gynecology combines antenatal care, labor ward emergencies, gynecologic surgery, reproductive health, fertility, oncology, and public health priorities. In Ghana it is central to maternal health, safe delivery, emergency obstetric care, and women's health across teaching hospitals, regional hospitals, district facilities, and private practice.

averageSalaryGHS.disclaimer: Broad directional monthly estimates in Ghana cedis only. Real income varies by seniority, public/private mix, location, call burden, institutional policy, and private practice volume.

trainingPathway.summary: Membership and fellowship training across antenatal care, labor ward, gynecologic surgery, emergency obstetrics, and reproductive health.
prerequisites: MDC registration
Housemanship
GCPS admission requirements
Readiness for emergency call and theatre work

data.residencyPathwayGhana: GCPS Obstetrics and Gynaecology training occurs at accredited centers; official training center lists include Korle-Bu, Komfo Anokye, 37 Military Hospital, Greater Accra Regional Hospital, Tamale, Ho, Cape Coast, and regional hospitals.
data.personalityFitDescription: Best for resilient, empathic clinicians who want both procedures and meaningful patient relationships.
data.idealCandidateDescription: A decisive communicator who can move from counseling to emergency theatre without losing empathy.
majorCons: Unpredictable hours
High emotional and medicolegal stress
Emergency call burden

dayInLifeTimeline.activity: Labor ward handover and high-risk patient review
Emergency caesarean or elective theatre list
Antenatal or gynecology clinic
Post-op reviews and counseling
On-call delivery support and emergency triage

name: Psychiatry
short_description: A relationship-rich specialty focused on mental health, communication, and long-term recovery.
full_description: Psychiatry addresses mental illness, substance use, trauma, family systems, consultation-liaison care, and community mental health. In Ghana the specialty has major workforce need, high public health relevance, and opportunities in teaching hospitals, psychiatric hospitals, district services, NGOs, schools, and private practice.

data.name: Psychiatry
data.shortDescription: A relationship-rich specialty focused on mental health, communication, and long-term recovery.
data.fullDescription: Psychiatry addresses mental illness, substance use, trauma, family systems, consultation-liaison care, and community mental health. In Ghana the specialty has major workforce need, high public health relevance, and opportunities in teaching hospitals, psychiatric hospitals, district services, NGOs, schools, and private practice.

averageSalaryGHS.disclaimer: Broad directional monthly estimates in Ghana cedis only. Real income varies by seniority, public/private mix, location, call burden, institutional policy, and private practice volume.

trainingPathway.summary: Residency in adult psychiatry, child/adolescent exposure, consultation-liaison psychiatry, community mental health, psychotherapy, and psychopharmacology.
prerequisites: MDC registration
Housemanship
GCPS admission requirements
Comfort with reflective interviewing

data.residencyPathwayGhana: Postgraduate psychiatry training is recognized as a priority area in GCPS admissions guidance and is delivered through accredited services with teaching and community exposure.
data.personalityFitDescription: Best for reflective listeners who can sit with complex stories and communicate without rushing.
data.idealCandidateDescription: An emotionally resilient communicator who respects culture, stigma, family dynamics, and long-term therapeutic work.
majorPros: More predictable lifestyle than many acute specialties
majorCons: Stigma and resource barriers
Emotionally heavy narratives
Progress can be slow

dayInLifeTimeline.activity: Inpatient handover and risk review
New patient assessment and family interview
Medication review and multidisciplinary meeting
Outpatient follow-up or psychotherapy session
Consult-liaison referral from medical or emergency unit

name: Anesthesiology
short_description: Perioperative physiology, airway management, pain control, and critical care for precise calm clinicians.
full_description: Perioperative physiology, airway management, pain control, and critical care for precise calm clinicians. The Ghana pathway should be checked against current Ghana College of Physicians and Surgeons admissions, rules, and training-center guidance because accredited sites and requirements can change over time.

Good standing with the Medical and Dental Council, Ghana
Relevant College or institution admission requirements

data.residencyPathwayGhana: Specialist training should align with current GCPS admissions and accredited training center guidance.
data.personalityFitDescription: A strong fit for students whose profile matches surgery and airway work.
data.idealCandidateDescription: The ideal candidate is realistic about Ghanaian training demands and consistently energized by perioperative physiology, airway management, pain control, and critical care for precise calm clinicians.
majorPros: Useful public and private sector pathways
majorCons: Training opportunities may be concentrated in major centers
Resource limitations can shape daily work

name: Periodontics
short_description: Gum, implant-support, and oral-systemic disease specialty balancing chronic care and precision procedures.
full_description: Gum, implant-support, and oral-systemic disease specialty balancing chronic care and precision procedures. The Ghana pathway should be checked against current Ghana College of Physicians and Surgeons admissions, rules, and training-center guidance because accredited sites and requirements can change over time.

averageSalaryGHS.disclaimer: Broad directional monthly estimates in Ghana cedis only. Real income varies by seniority, public/private mix, location, call burden, institutional policy, and private practice volume.

trainingPathway.summary: Dental qualification, clinical practice or housemanship where applicable, postgraduate dental specialty training for specialist pathways, exams, and supervised case logs.
prerequisites: Professional qualification
Good standing with the Medical and Dental Council, Ghana
Relevant College or institution admission requirements

data.residencyPathwayGhana: Dental specialist training should align with current Medical and Dental Council, dental school, GCPS dental surgery, or recognized regional postgraduate pathways.
data.personalityFitDescription: A strong fit for students whose profile matches University of Ghana Dental School and University of Ghana Dental Hospital work.
data.idealCandidateDescription: The ideal candidate is realistic about Ghanaian training demands and consistently energized by gum, implant-support, and oral-systemic disease specialty balancing chronic care and precision procedures.
majorPros: Useful public and private sector pathways
majorCons: Training opportunities may be concentrated in major centers
